$comment: Recognition vocabulary for manifest member roles (spec 2026-07-23-yard-board S2; design rev 5 section 5.5). Same posture as kinds.json/outcomes.json: DATA, never a schema enum - an unrecognised role is a detector discovery, not a validation failure (Law 7). The gate NAME is a separate member field (manifest.members[].gate), so this vocabulary stays unparameterised.
